svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.0.3 Chrome/140.0.7339.249 Electron/38.7.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.0.3" scale="1" border="5"> <diagram id="diag_ja_biztown_3.0_—_cms_offline_f" name="JA BizTown 3.0 — CMS Offline Fallback Architecture"> <mxGraphModel dx="1106" dy="762" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="850" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="7Zpq0Xiii22GttAFv_6z-2" value="" style="group" vertex="1" connectable="0" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="30" width="950" height="553" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tb_offline_box" value="" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;dashed=1;strokeColor=#82b366;fillColor=none;" parent="7Zpq0Xiii22GttAFv_6z-2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="43" y="400" width="848" height="126" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sl_cms" value="Cloud CMS Layer (Pre-Simulation Warmup — T-30 mins)" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;expand=0;" parent="7Zpq0Xiii22GttAFv_6z-2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="59" width="840" height="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_cms" value="Headless CMS
(Content API)" style="shape=mxgraph.azure2.api_management;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" parent="sl_cms" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="35" width="170" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_blob" value="Azure Blob Storage
(Media Assets)" style="shape=mxgraph.azure2.storage_blob;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;" parent="sl_cms" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="210" y="35" width="170" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_cdn" value="Azure CDN
(Edge Distribution)" style="shape=mxgraph.azure2.cdn_profiles;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" parent="sl_cms" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="400" y="35" width="170" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_fn" value="Azure Functions
(Warmup Orchestrator)" style="shape=mxgraph.azure2.function_apps;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" parent="sl_cms" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="590" y="35" width="170" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sl_sync" value="Warmup Sync Service (On-Device Background Worker)" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;expand=0;" parent="7Zpq0Xiii22GttAFv_6z-2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry y="245" width="950" height="133" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_probe" value="Network Probe
(30-min pre-sim check)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;" parent="sl_sync" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="8" y="35" width="185" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_pull" value="Content Snapshot
Pull (Delta Sync)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" parent="sl_sync" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="235" y="70" width="185" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_check" value="SHA-256 Checksum
Verification" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f4cccc;strokeColor=#cc0000;fontSize=11;" parent="sl_sync" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="496" y="48" width="180" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_idb" value="Write to IndexedDB
(Structured Storage)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" parent="sl_sync" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="748" y="34" width="185" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sl_exec" value="Simulation Execution (Offline — Zero CMS Dependency)" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;expand=0;" parent="7Zpq0Xiii22GttAFv_6z-2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="46" y="395" width="840" height="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_read" value="Read Content
from IndexedDB" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" parent="sl_exec" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="3" y="35" width="185" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_render" value="Render UI:
Roles / Products / Rules" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" parent="sl_exec" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="242" y="35" width="185" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_fallback" value="Serve Fallback
Placeholder (if missing)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;" parent="sl_exec" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="440" y="35" width="185" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_txn" value="Run Payment
Transactions (Local Ledger)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" parent="sl_exec" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="648" y="35" width="185" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tb_offline" value="100% Offline Boundary — No CMS required after sync" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;shadow=0;dashed=1;strokeColor=#82b366;fillColor=none;align=left;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;" parent="7Zpq0Xiii22GttAFv_6z-2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="41" y="375" width="848" height="178" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" value="Trigger Warmup
Job" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;fontSize=9;" parent="7Zpq0Xiii22GttAFv_6z-2" source="n_fn" target="n_probe" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" value="Delta Content
Snapshot" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#0078D4;fontStyle=1;fontSize=9;" parent="7Zpq0Xiii22GttAFv_6z-2" source="n_cms" target="n_pull" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="164" y="195" /> <mxPoint x="105" y="195" /> <mxPoint x="105" y="225" /> <mxPoint x="210" y="225" /> <mxPoint x="210" y="343" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" value="Binary Media
Assets" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#0078D4;fontStyle=1;fontSize=9;" parent="7Zpq0Xiii22GttAFv_6z-2" source="n_blob" target="n_pull" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="354" y="95" /> <mxPoint x="350" y="95" /> <mxPoint x="350" y="195" /> <mxPoint x="199" y="195" /> <mxPoint x="199" y="327" /> <mxPoint x="210" y="327" /> <mxPoint x="210" y="343" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" value="Verify Integrity" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#cc0000;fontStyle=1;fontSize=9;" parent="7Zpq0Xiii22GttAFv_6z-2" source="n_pull" target="n_check" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="420" y="350" /> <mxPoint x="458" y="350" /> <mxPoint x="458" y="321" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" value="Cache Verified
Content" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;fontSize=9;" parent="7Zpq0Xiii22GttAFv_6z-2" source="n_check" target="n_idb" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" value="Serve Local
Content" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#0078D4;dashed=1;fontStyle=1;fontSize=9;" parent="7Zpq0Xiii22GttAFv_6z-2" source="n_idb" target="n_read" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="713" y="225" /> <mxPoint x="200" y="225" /> <mxPoint x="200" y="425" /> <mxPoint x="113" y="425" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" value="Render Data" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#0078D4;fontStyle=1;fontSize=9;" parent="7Zpq0Xiii22GttAFv_6z-2" source="n_read" target="n_render" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" value="On Checksum
Failure" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.75;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#cc0000;dashed=1;fontStyle=1;fontSize=9;" parent="7Zpq0Xiii22GttAFv_6z-2" source="n_check" target="n_fallback" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="631" y="273" /> <mxPoint x="450" y="273" /> <mxPoint x="450" y="389" /> <mxPoint x="579" y="389" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e9" value="Proceed to
Payment Flow" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;fontSize=9;" parent="7Zpq0Xiii22GttAFv_6z-2" source="n_read" target="n_txn" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="260" y="458" /> <mxPoint x="260" y="505" /> <mxPoint x="413" y="505" /> <mxPoint x="413" y="495" /> <mxPoint x="640" y="495" /> <mxPoint x="640" y="458" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
